opus.c(3) Library Functions Manual opus.c(3)

NAME

opus.c - Opus audio codec implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


opus_codec_t * opus_codec_create_encoder (opus_application_t application, int sample_rate, int bitrate)
opus_codec_t * opus_codec_create_decoder (int sample_rate)
size_t opus_codec_encode (opus_codec_t *codec, const float *samples, int num_samples, uint8_t *out_data, size_t out_size)
int opus_codec_decode (opus_codec_t *codec, const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len, float *out_samples, int out_num_samples)
asciichat_error_t opus_codec_set_bitrate (opus_codec_t *codec, int bitrate)
int opus_codec_get_bitrate (opus_codec_t *codec)
asciichat_error_t opus_codec_set_dtx (opus_codec_t *codec, int enable)
void opus_codec_destroy (opus_codec_t *codec)

Detailed Description

Opus audio codec implementation.

Definition in file opus.c.

Function Documentation

opus_codec_t * opus_codec_create_decoder (int sample_rate)

Definition at line 74 of file opus.c.

74                                                          {
75   if (sample_rate <= 0) {
76     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid sample rate: %d", sample_rate);
77     return NULL;
78   }
79 
80   opus_codec_t *codec = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(opus_codec_t), opus_codec_t *);
81   if (!codec) {
82     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate opus codec context");
83     return NULL;
84   }
85 
86   // Create decoder
87   int error = OPUS_OK;
88   codec->decoder = opus_decoder_create(sample_rate, 1, &error);
89   if (error != OPUS_OK || !codec->decoder) {
90     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Failed to create Opus decoder: %s", opus_strerror(error));
91     SAFE_FREE(codec);
92     return NULL;
93   }
94 
95   codec->encoder = NULL;
96   codec->sample_rate = sample_rate;
97   codec->bitrate = 0; // N/A for decoder
98   codec->tmp_buffer = NULL;
99 
100   log_debug("Opus decoder created: sample_rate=%d", sample_rate);
101 
102   // Register Opus decoder for debugging
103   NAMED_REGISTER_CONTEXT(codec, "opus_decoder", "opus_codec", NULL);
104 
105   return codec;
106 }




Referenced by handle_stream_start_packet(), and
    session_host_start_render().






opus_codec_t
  * opus_codec_create_encoder (opus_application_t application, int sample_rate,
  int bitrate)


Definition at line 19 of file opus.c.


19                                                                                                       {
20   if (sample_rate <= 0 || bitrate <= 0) {
21     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid codec parameters: sample_rate=%d, bitrate=%d", sample_rate, bitrate);
22     return NULL;
23   }
24 
25   opus_codec_t *codec = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(opus_codec_t), opus_codec_t *);
26   if (!codec) {
27     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate opus codec context");
28     return NULL;
29   }
30 
31   // Create encoder
32   int error = OPUS_OK;
33   codec->encoder = opus_encoder_create(sample_rate, 1, (int)application, &error);
34   if (error != OPUS_OK || !codec->encoder) {
35     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Failed to create Opus encoder: %s", opus_strerror(error));
36     SAFE_FREE(codec);
37     return NULL;
38   }
39 
40   // Set bitrate
41   error = opus_encoder_ctl(codec->encoder, OPUS_SET_BITRATE(bitrate));
42   if (error != OPUS_OK) {
43     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Failed to set Opus bitrate: %s", opus_strerror(error));
44     opus_encoder_destroy(codec->encoder);
45     SAFE_FREE(codec);
46     return NULL;
47   }
48 
49   // Enable DTX (Discontinuous Transmission) for efficient silence frame encoding
50   // DTX allows the encoder to produce very small packets (3-4 bytes) for silence,
51   // reducing bandwidth usage while maintaining audio quality for voice/music
52   error = opus_encoder_ctl(codec->encoder, OPUS_SET_DTX(1));
53   if (error != OPUS_OK) {
54     log_warn("Failed to enable Opus DTX: %s (continuing without DTX)", opus_strerror(error));
55   }
56 
57   codec->decoder = NULL;
58   codec->sample_rate = sample_rate;
59   codec->bitrate = bitrate;
60   codec->tmp_buffer = NULL;
61 
62   log_debug("Opus encoder created: sample_rate=%d, bitrate=%d bps, DTX enabled", sample_rate, bitrate);
63 
64   // Register Opus encoder for debugging
65   NAMED_REGISTER_CONTEXT(codec, "opus_encoder", "opus_codec", NULL);
66 
67   return codec;
68 }






Referenced by client_audio_render_thread(),
    session_host_start_render(), and
    session_participant_start_audio_capture().






int
  opus_codec_decode (opus_codec_t * codec, const uint8_t * data, size_t
  data_len, float * out_samples, int out_num_samples)


Definition at line 143 of file opus.c.


144                                            {
145   if (!codec || !codec->decoder || !out_samples || out_num_samples <= 0) {
146     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
147               "Invalid decode parameters: codec=%p, decoder=%p, out_samples=%p, out_num_samples=%d", (void *)codec,
148               (void *)(codec ? codec->decoder : NULL), (void *)out_samples, out_num_samples);
149     return -1;
150   }
151 
152   // If data is NULL, use PLC (Packet Loss Concealment)
153   if (!data || data_len == 0) {
154     log_debug_every(LOG_RATE_VERY_FAST, "Opus PLC (Packet Loss Concealment)");
155     int samples = opus_decode_float(codec->decoder, NULL, 0, out_samples, out_num_samples, 0);
156     if (samples < 0) {
157       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Opus PLC failed: %s", opus_strerror(samples));
158       return -1;
159     }
160     return samples;
161   }
162 
163   // Decode frame
164   int samples = opus_decode_float(codec->decoder, data, (opus_int32)data_len, out_samples, out_num_samples, 0);
165 
166   if (samples < 0) {
167     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Opus decoding failed: %s", opus_strerror(samples));
168     return -1;
169   }
170 
171   return samples;
172 }

    handle_audio_opus_packet().






void
  opus_codec_destroy (opus_codec_t * codec)


Definition at line 230 of file opus.c.


230                                              {
231   if (!codec) {
232     return;
233   }
234 
235   NAMED_UNREGISTER(codec);
236 
237   if (codec->encoder) {
238     opus_encoder_destroy(codec->encoder);
239     codec->encoder = NULL;
240   }
241 
242   if (codec->decoder) {
243     opus_decoder_destroy(codec->decoder);
244     codec->decoder = NULL;
245   }
246 
247   if (codec->tmp_buffer) {
248     SAFE_FREE(codec->tmp_buffer);
249     codec->tmp_buffer = NULL;
250   }
251 
252   SAFE_FREE(codec);
253 }

    client_audio_render_thread(), session_host_destroy(),
    session_host_start_render(), session_host_stop_render(), and
    session_participant_destroy().






size_t
  opus_codec_encode (opus_codec_t * codec, const float * samples, int
  num_samples, uint8_t * out_data, size_t out_size)


Definition at line 112 of file opus.c.


113                                           {
114   if (!codec || !codec->encoder || !samples || num_samples <= 0 || !out_data || out_size == 0) {
115     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
116               "Invalid encode parameters: codec=%p, encoder=%p, samples=%p, num_samples=%d, out_data=%p, "
117               "out_size=%zu",
118               (void *)codec, (void *)(codec ? codec->encoder : NULL), (const void *)samples, num_samples,
119               (void *)out_data, out_size);
120     return 0;
121   }
122 
123   // Encode frame
124   opus_int32 encoded_bytes = opus_encode_float(codec->encoder, samples, num_samples, out_data, (opus_int32)out_size);
125 
126   if (encoded_bytes < 0) {
127     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Opus encoding failed: %s", opus_strerror((int)encoded_bytes));
128     return 0;
129   }
130 
131   if (encoded_bytes == 0) {
132     // DTX frame (silence) - encoder produced zero bytes
133     log_debug_every(LOG_RATE_VERY_FAST, "Opus DTX frame (silence detected)");
134   }
135 
136   return (size_t)encoded_bytes;
137 }






Referenced by client_audio_render_thread().






int
  opus_codec_get_bitrate (opus_codec_t * codec)


Definition at line 195 of file opus.c.


195                                                 {
196   if (!codec || !codec->encoder) {
197     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid codec for bitrate query");
198     return -1;
199   }
200 
201   opus_int32 bitrate = 0;
202   int error = opus_encoder_ctl(codec->encoder, OPUS_GET_BITRATE(&bitrate));
203   if (error != OPUS_OK) {
204     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Failed to get Opus bitrate: %s", opus_strerror(error));
205     return -1;
206   }
207 
208   return (int)bitrate;
209 }










asciichat_error_t
  opus_codec_set_bitrate (opus_codec_t * codec, int bitrate)


Definition at line 178 of file opus.c.


178                                                                            {
179   if (!codec || !codec->encoder || bitrate <= 0) {
180     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid bitrate parameters: codec=%p, encoder=%p, bitrate=%d", (void *)codec,
181                      (void *)(codec ? codec->encoder : NULL), bitrate);
182   }
183 
184   int error = opus_encoder_ctl(codec->encoder, OPUS_SET_BITRATE(bitrate));
185   if (error != OPUS_OK) {
186     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Failed to set Opus bitrate: %s", opus_strerror(error));
187   }
188 
189   codec->bitrate = bitrate;
190   log_debug("Opus bitrate changed to %d bps", bitrate);
191 
192   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
193 }










asciichat_error_t
  opus_codec_set_dtx (opus_codec_t * codec, int enable)


Definition at line 211 of file opus.c.


211                                                                       {
212   if (!codec || !codec->encoder) {
213     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid codec for DTX configuration");
214   }
215 
216   int error = opus_encoder_ctl(codec->encoder, OPUS_SET_DTX(enable ? 1 : 0));
217   if (error != OPUS_OK) {
218     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_AUDIO, "Failed to set Opus DTX: %s", opus_strerror(error));
219   }
220 
221   log_debug("Opus DTX %s", enable ? "enabled" : "disabled");
222 
223   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
224 }
